title: AI Web Designer/Developer
company_focus: Women's health and weight loss solutions
description:
At SheMed, our mission is to revolutionise women's health by
providing accessible and personalised solutions tailored
specifically for women. We are a startup consisting of
enthusiastic people who are committed to empowering women
with the knowledge and tools they need to take control of
their health and well-being. SheMed is an innovative and
advanced weight loss programme that is groundbreaking in the
world of women’s health. We have an unwavering dedication to
quality care, and strive to create a supportive and
compassionate community where every woman can thrive and
achieve optimal health. In doing so, we believe SheMed will
be a strong force in closing the women’s health gap.

We’re looking for a creative and technically-savvy Web
Designer/Developer with experience using AI tools who
thrives in fast-paced environments to join our UK-based team
and help drive creative growth across digital and web
services. You’ll play a key role in delivering high-
performing, thoughtful design work for campaigns, product
launches, and brand-building initiatives.

Please note: This is a office based role, Monday to Friday
(9am - 6pm). We are based in Euston, London.

WHAT YOU’LL WORK ON:

- Have full ownership of the design and maintenance of high-
  quality, user-centric web pages that reflect our brand
  identity
- Ability to critically evaluate and improve existing designs,
  not just create new ones
- Collaborating with the in house creative and marketing teams
  to turn concepts into visually compelling and functional
  websites
- Proven track record of integrating AI into design workflows
  to improve speed, output, or performance
- Design and develop user friendly, high-converting landing
  pages that drive conversions and are fully optimised for
  speed, SEO, and mobile devices
- Optimise websites for speed, web accessibility compliance,
  and SEO best practices
- Comfortable interpreting data, heatmaps, and user insights
  to inform design decisions
- Contributing to our website refresh and ongoing design
  system improvements
- Helping improve brand storytelling through layout,
  typography, colour, motion graphics, across different
  devices
- Creating content variations for A/B testing and gaining
  insights for performance optimisation and increase
  conversation
- Jumping in across projects when needed-this is a
  collaborative team in a growing startup

WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

- 2-5 years of experience as a web designer (brand or agency
  side), ideally in a B2C or consumer environment with
  active interest in AI
- Experience using specific AI tools like Claude, Framer,
  Figma Make, Midjourney
- Able to move between different AI tools as each one has
  strengths, knowing which ones to use at the right time
- A strong portfolio showcasing design thinking and web
  implementation
- Strong grasp of design fundamentals including UI/ UX
  principles, visual hierarchy, responsive design and colour
  theory
- Understanding of SEO and web performance metrics
- Ability to work quickly, respond to feedback, and juggle
  multiple priorities with calm and clarity
- Great attention to detail and care for visual consistency
- Collaborative mindset - you’re eager to build, support, and
  contribute beyond your lane when needed
- Understanding of HTML, CSS, Webflow and JavaScript (not
  essential)
- Interest in women’s health or mission-driven work is a bonus

WHAT WE OFFER:

- A mission-driven team focused on closing the women’s health
  gap
- Competitive Salary
- 25 days holiday
- Breakfast and all day snacks
- Monthly socials
- Health care Cash Plan including physio, digital clinical
  appointments and wellbeing for you, your partner and
  children
- £80 contribution to noise cancelling headphones
- Life insurance cover of 4x salary
- Pension contribution matched up to 5%
- Cycle to work scheme

Please note that offers of employment are subject to receipt
of satisfactory references and a enhanced DBS check.



WORKING AT SHEMED

Whether you work in one of our amazing offices, clinics or
part of our remote clinician workforce, SheMed is highly
collaborative and fun! You’ll have a chance to work in a
fast-paced environment with experienced industry leaders. We
have a learning environment where you can make an impact.



WHO WE ARE

At SheMed our people aren’t just part of a team, they’re
part of something bigger. We’re a vibrant community of
creative thinkers and doers, forging the way for a new
generation of healthcare. We’re only as good as our people.
So, finding the best people is everything to us. We serve
millions, but we choose our people one at a time…



DIVERSITY

We believe that difference inspires a better, healthier
world. That’s why it’s at the heart of everything we do.
From our people to our products, difference enriches every
part of our business and creates a culture based on equality
of opportunity, and in which all employees can progress
their careers. We’re committed to creating an environment of
mutual respect where equal employment opportunities are
available to all applicants without regard to race, colour,
religion, sex, pregnancy status, national origin, age,
physical and mental disability, marital status, sexual
orientation, gender identity, gender expression, genetic
information, and any other characteristic protected by
applicable law.
responsibilities: Design and maintain high-quality, user-centric web pages reflecting brand identity

Integrate AI tools into design workflows to improve speed, output, and performance
Design and develop high-converting landing pages optimised for speed, SEO, and mobile
Optimise websites for web accessibility compliance and SEO best practices
Interpret data, heatmaps, and user insights to inform design decisions
Contribute to website refresh and ongoing design system improvements

use_cases: Women's health digital experience and brand presence
High-converting landing pages for weight loss programme
Website optimization for SEO and accessibility
A/B testing for conversion rate optimization
Brand storytelling through web design across devices
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role is for a Web Designer/Developer who uses AI tools
(Claude, Midjourney, Figma Make) to assist in design
workflows, not to build, train, or deploy AI/ML models. The
AI usage is as a productivity tool for web design tasks like
generating designs and content, making this an ai-support
role.
